topics.name: Taiwan Atmospheric Field Campaigns
topics.scope: Taiwan atmospheric observation campaigns and field studies involving terrain rainfall, monsoon flow, aerosol, cloud microphysics, CCN, radar, sounding, lidar, or in-situ measurements.
include: TAHOPE/PRECIP severe rainfall, radar, aircraft, and data-assimilation observations
Cape Fuguei aerosol and CCN field observations
Taiwan complex-terrain precipitation and local circulation studies
exclude: pure global modeling with no Taiwan observation component
news-only claims without paper, official data, or project documentation
